title: phyllanthus tui
intro: Phyllanthus tui, also known as Ma'oh or 'Ohi'a lehua, is a plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. It is rich in medicinal properties, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are known to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus tui include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations have been used to treat various ailments for centuries.
